content.text:
Here's what changed:

**`settings.json`** — added explicit defaults for:
- `cleanupPeriodDays` (30), `respectGitignore` (true), `showTurnDuration` (true)
- `spinnerTipsEnabled` (true), `terminalProgressBarEnabled` (false — your `prefersReducedMotion` suggests this), `alwaysThinkingEnabled` (false), `fastModePerSessionOptIn` (false)
- `disableAllHooks` (false), `enableAllProjectMcpServers` (false), `teammateMode` ("auto")
- `model` (claude-opus-4-6), `language` (english), `plansDirectory`
- `attribution` — set both to `""` (hides attribution per your style)
- Full `sandbox` block with all defaults (disabled)
- `permissions.ask`, `permissions.deny`, `permissions.additionalDirectories` — empty arrays made explicit
- `env` block with all key env var defaults (token budgets, timeouts, feature flags)

**`run.sh`** — added:
- All documented env vars as exports (active ones) or comments (ones to toggle)
- Fixed typo: `--dissallowedTools` → `--disallowed-tools`
- Removed deprecated `--mcp-debug` (use `--debug` if needed)
- Added `--model="claude-opus-4-6"` explicitly
- Removed `--allow-dangerously-skip-permissions` (was enabling bypass as an *option* — re-add if you want it)
- Organized env vars by category with inline documentation of defaults

Things to decide:
- I dropped `--allow-dangerously-skip-permissions` — add back if you use it for sandboxed runs
- `terminalProgressBarEnabled: false` — I assumed you'd want this off with `prefersReducedMotion`, flip if not
- `attribution` blanked — adjust if you want co-authored-by trailers
